overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a colorful medieval marketplace in Beauclair. The scene features cobblestone streets, vibrant market stalls with red canopies, and various NPCs in period clothing under bright summer sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market entrance with red flower arbor

agents.ego_description: walking under a red flower-covered arbor into the marketplace, approaching a food vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor in green and orange clothing standing behind a food display stall

entered.detail: wooden trellis structure covered in red bougainvillea flowers overhead
wooden market stall with dark red fabric canopy displaying bread and fruits
three-story yellow building with shuttered windows and balconies

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking under a decorative arbor covered in red flowers, entering a medieval marketplace. A food stall with a red canopy stands to the right, while colorful historic buildings line the background. The cobblestone ground features a distinctive red and gray pattern.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market lane with food vendors and pedestrians

events.description: slight turn to the left to navigate around the corner of the food stall

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the food stall, passing the vendor and navigating through oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in blue coat and wide-brimmed hat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tree with purple blossoms lining the street in the distance
wooden cart with large spoked wheels and white canvas cover

segments.scene_description: Moving out from under the flower arbor into the open lane, Geralt walks alongside the food stall as the vendor stands nearby. A pedestrian in a blue coat approaches from the left, while a wooden cart sits parked beside the path. The environment transitions from covered to exposed sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with multiple vendor stalls and colorful facades

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market past the white canopy stall and various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in brown dress with white sleeves walking past the camera

entered.detail: market stall with white canopy decorated with hanging red flower garlands
bright red building with arched doorways and decorative stone trim
stone archway tunnel entrance at the end of the market street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider market square with a white-canopied stall on the left adorned with red flowers. Geralt passes a woman in a brown dress as more pedestrians populate the area. In the distance, a stone archway leads deeper into the city, while colorful townhouses in red and blue create a vibrant backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt transitions from a shaded, floral entryway into a wide, sun-drenched medieval marketplace. It begins with the character walking under a decorative arbor covered in red flowers, passing a red-canopied food stall and patterned cobblestones. As he moves out from under the arbor, the scene shifts into exposed sunlight where he passes a wooden cart and a pedestrian in a blue coat. The environment then opens into a broader market square, moving past a white-canopied stall and various townspeople. Finally, the view expands to reveal a vibrant backdrop of red and blue townhouses and a distant stone archway leading deeper into the city.
